titleStmt.title: SII 17.162: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 162. (A.R. No. 142 of 1904.) TIRUKAṆṬHĒŚVARAM, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east base of the central shrine in the Naṭanapādēśvara temple.

This record registers the gift of 1 kāśu and 6 mā by Śikkal-uḍaiyāṉ Śeyyapādaṅkūttaṉ for a sandhi lamp to god Tirukkaṇṇīśvaram-uḍaiya Mahādēva in Śōḻakulavallinallūr in Paṭṭāṉpākkai-nāḍu in Gaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The gift was, received by the śivabrāhmaṇa Bhāradvāji Tirunīlakaṇṭaṉ Tirukkaṇṇīśvaram-uḍaiyāṉ, Kunikkum Pirān, Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ Pūvattaiyan and Śēndaṉ Pichchadēvan.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 9 Āvatu kaṅkai koṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭup paṭṭāṉpākkaināṭṭu
coḻakulavalli(nali)nallūrt tirukkaṇṇiśvaramuṭaiya mātevaṟku cikkaluṭaiyāṉ ceyyapātaṅ kūttaṉ vaitta san=ti viḷakku 1 Oṉṟukkum Ikkoyil
śivappirāmaṇaṉ bhārattuvāśi tirunīlakaṇṭaṉ tiru[ kkaṇṇīśvara] muṭaiyāṉuṅ kunikkum pirānum tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyāṉ pūvattaiyanum centaṉ piccatevanum
koṇṭa kācu Oṉṟe Āṟumā 1vapa vumkoṇṭu santrātittavaṟ Erikka kaṭavom . Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.162 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
